description.en: Abooleanfor whether the video will pause when this cue stops being displayed.

excerpt.es: Abooleanfor whether the video will pause when this cue stops being displayed.
excerpt.en: Abooleanfor whether the video will pause when this cue stops being displayed.

description.en: Represents the indentation of the cue within the line. This can be the stringauto, a number representing the percentage of theVTTCue.region, or the video size ifVTTCue.regionisnull.

excerpt.es: Represents the indentation of the cue within the line. This can be the stringauto, a number representing the percentage of theVTTCue.region, or the video size ifVTTCue.regionisnull.
excerpt.en: Represents the indentation of the cue within the line. This can be the stringauto, a number representing the percentage of theVTTCue.region, or the video size ifVTTCue.regionisnull.

description.en: An enum representing the alignment of the cue. This is used to determine what theVTTCue.positionis anchored to. The default isauto.

excerpt.es: An enum representing the alignment of the cue. This is used to determine what theVTTCue.positionis anchored to. The default isauto.
excerpt.en: An enum representing the alignment of the cue. This is used to determine what theVTTCue.positionis anchored to. The default isauto.
